value:
-Eternal Pass is valid for a period of one month following purchase, and will be automatically renewed at the end of this period.
*The one-month period ends on the same date and time as the date and time of purchase in the following month.
   Ex.: If you purchase Eternal Pass on January 1 at 1:00 JST, it will be valid until February 1 at 12:59 JST.
*If the equivalent date does not exist in the following month, the validity period will end on the closest date in the following month.
Ex.: If you purchase Eternal Pass on March 31 at 1:00 JST, it will be valid until April 30 at 12:59 JST.
*If Eternal Pass is purchased/renewed near the beginning or ending of the month, the validity period may be altered by several days depending on when it is reflected to your platform.
-If you want to cancel Eternal Pass, do so at least three days (72 hours) prior to the next automatic renewal.
*If you cancel Eternal Pass within three days (72 hours) of the next automatic renewal, it may be reflected to your platform on a different date, causing cancellation to not be completed when you intended.
-You will still be able to enjoy the benefits of Eternal Pass until the end of the validity period, even if you cancel it partway through.
Ex.: If you purchase Eternal Pass on January 1 at 1:00 JST and cancel it on January 2, you will still receive the benefits until February 1 at 12:59 JST.

*The one-month period ends on the same date and time as the date and time of purchase in the following month.

Cancel your subscription using the following procedure.
1. Select your user name in Settings.
2. Select <size="36">[</size>Subscriptions<size="36">]</size>.
3. Select your subscriptions for <size="36">[</size>SD Gundam G Generation ETERNAL<size="36">]</size>.
4. Select <size="36">[</size>Cancel Subscription<size="36">]</size> to cancel.
*Your subscription will not be cancelled even if you delete the app or your game data (account).
*If there is anything you do not understand about the cancellation procedure, contact your platform for support.

Cancel your subscription using the following procedure.
1. Select your user icon in the Play Store.
2. Select <size="36">[</size>Payments & subscriptions<size="36">]</size>.
3. Select <size="36">[</size>Subscriptions<size="36">]</size>.
4. Select your subscriptions for <size="36">[</size>SD Gundam G Generation ETERNAL<size="36">]</size>.
5. Select <size="36">[</size>Cancel Subscription<size="36">]</size> to cancel.
*Your subscription will not be cancelled even if you delete the app or your game data (account).
*If there is anything you do not understand about the cancellation procedure, contact your platform for support.

-Issues may occur while processing your subscription. Do not close the app during payment processing (data transmission).
-If the effects of the subscription are not reflected in-app following purchase, try the following procedure.
Go to <size="36">[</size>Menu<size="36">]</size> > <size="36">[</size>Diamond Shop<size="36">]</size> on the SD Gundam G Generation ETERNAL app and select the <size="36">[</size>Purchase Status<size="36">]</size> button on the Purchase screen of the relevant subscription.
The effects listed above will be applied during the validity period.

-Items will be received upon purchase and when you first log in following renewal.
*If the items exceed your inventory limit, they will be sent to your Gifts.
*For details about the Premium Unit Assembly Ticket rates, please tap "Unit Assembly" on the bottom of the Main Screen, then "Premium Unit Assembly" > "Details/Drop Rate" > "Drop Rate".
*Limited Time AP Packs are valid for 30 days from the date they are received.
Limited Time AP Packs that have not been used by the end of the 30-day period will be lost.
